resharedPost.text:
This weekend we ran our first Garaža Frontier Hackathon!

21 teams / 80 students were building AI products for 40 hours in the Tenderly Belgrade office. Teams worked end to end from problem framing and technical execution to demos and pitches. The level of ideas and execution was consistently strong across teams.

The three prizes went to teams: 
Deepgrad – 1st place
Cascada – 2nd place
Srećan Kraj – 3rd place

Prizes were provided by Tenderly, Perplexity, Kortix, and Solflare, and we're thankful for their continued support of early stage builders. Teams were also supported by Insightful and LAUNCHub Ventures.

Perplexity, ElevenLabs, Lovable, Daytona and fal provided API credits and bounty awards.

We were happy to have mentors from the Garaža community over the weekend, spending time with teams and giving valuable feedback: George Dimitrijevic, Ivan Ralic, Luka Filipovic, Boris Janković and Miloš Zlatković.

We had 12 VCs visiting Belgrade for the Demo Day: LAUNCHub Ventures, Credo Ventures, Inovo.vc, Day One Capital, South Central Ventures, KAYA VC, Omorika Ventures, PortfoLion Capital Partners, Market One Capital, SQ Capital, Silicon Gardens, Constructor Capital.

A big thank you to the volunteers who supported the teams and helped keep everything running smoothly throughout the 2 days.

Special thanks to the Tenderly team for hosting us and helping organize the hackathon from start to finish!

Photo: Nemanja Rajić

posts.text:
Last weekend, I had the pleasure of competing alongside my talented teammates Stevan Adzic, Nikola Jovanovic, and Kristina Petric as Team Srećan Kraj. In just 40 hours, we built something we're truly proud of, earning us third place among an exceptionally strong field of competitors.

A huge thank you to Miljan Tekic, Milena Milić, and the entire Garaža team for organizing such a smooth and well-structured hackathon. Special thanks to Tenderly for hosting and supporting the event.

 Looking forward to what lies ahead!
